title: React Development
tagline: A high-performance React application built for scale
description: Built a complex React application with custom hooks, state management, and seamless API integration. The project featured real-time data updates, advanced filtering, and a component-driven architecture that made the codebase easy to maintain and extend.
highlights: Custom hook library for reusable business logic
Optimized rendering with React.memo and useMemo
Comprehensive unit and integration test coverage
challenge: The client needed a dashboard that could handle thousands of real-time data points without performance degradation, while remaining intuitive for non-technical users.
solution: We implemented virtualized lists, debounced state updates, and a smart caching layer that reduced API calls by 60%. The UI was designed with progressive disclosure to keep the interface clean.

title: App Design & Development
tagline: End-to-end mobile app from concept to App Store
description: Designed and developed a cross-platform mobile application from the ground up. The project spanned user research, wireframing, high-fidelity design, and full development with React Native, delivering a polished product ready for both iOS and Android stores.
highlights: Cross-platform React Native codebase for iOS & Android
Offline-first architecture with local data persistence
Push notifications and in-app messaging system
challenge: The client wanted a single codebase that felt truly native on both platforms, with offline capabilities for users in areas with spotty connectivity.
solution: We used React Native with platform-specific components where needed, AsyncStorage for offline data, and a background sync queue that reconciled data when connectivity returned.

title: Course Website
tagline: A modern e-learning platform with video streaming
description: Developed a comprehensive e-learning platform featuring video streaming, course progress tracking, quizzes, certificates, and a full payment integration. The admin dashboard allows instructors to manage content, track analytics, and communicate with students.
highlights: Adaptive video streaming with multiple quality levels
Interactive quizzes with instant feedback and scoring
Automated certificate generation upon course completion
Instructor analytics dashboard with revenue tracking
challenge: Building a platform that could handle concurrent video streams while maintaining fast page loads and a smooth user experience across all devices.
solution: We implemented HLS video streaming with adaptive bitrate, edge caching for static assets, and a microservices architecture that separated video processing from the main application server.

title: Magazine App
tagline: A beautifully crafted digital magazine experience
description: Designed a premium digital magazine application with immersive reading experiences, dynamic layouts, and gesture-driven navigation. The design focused on typography, whitespace, and visual storytelling to create an experience that felt as luxurious as print.
highlights: Dark and light reading modes with auto-switching
challenge: Recreating the premium feel of a print magazine in a digital format while ensuring the experience was smooth on both high-end and mid-range devices.
solution: We developed a custom layout engine that dynamically adjusted content flow based on screen size, used Lottie for micro-animations, and implemented progressive image loading for visually rich pages.

title: Crypto App Development
tagline: Real-time crypto tracking and portfolio management
description: Built a comprehensive cryptocurrency tracking and portfolio management application with real-time price feeds, interactive charts, portfolio analytics, and secure wallet integration. The app processes thousands of data points per second while maintaining a responsive interface.
highlights: Real-time price tracking with WebSocket feeds
Interactive candlestick and line charts with zoom
Portfolio performance analytics and P&L tracking
challenge: Processing high-frequency real-time data feeds while keeping the UI responsive, and ensuring rock-solid security for financial data.
solution: We implemented a WebSocket gateway with Redis pub/sub for efficient data distribution, Web Workers for off-thread chart calculations, and a multi-layered security architecture with encryption at rest and in transit.

title: Chad Mathew Profile Gallery
tagline: Professional portfolio gallery for Sydney-based photographer
description: Created a stunning portfolio website for Chad Mathew, a renowned photographer and designer based in Sydney. The site showcases his diverse work through an interactive gallery with smooth transitions, advanced filtering by category, and seamless image lazy-loading for optimal performance.
highlights: Interactive lightbox gallery with smooth animations
Light and dark mode with system preference detection
Optimized image delivery with WebP fallback support
Mobile-responsive design for all device types
challenge: Creating a gallery that could handle high-resolution images while maintaining blazing-fast load times and delivering a premium visual experience for a professional photographer.
solution: We implemented next-image optimization with automatic WebP conversion, lazy loading with blur-up effect, and a grid layout that adapts seamlessly across all screen sizes. Added smooth animations using Framer Motion for gallery transitions.

title: Servix - Plumber Finder App
tagline: Connect with trusted plumbers and service professionals
description: Developed a mobile marketplace app that connects users with verified plumbers and service professionals in their area. The app features real-time location tracking, instant messaging, service history, ratings, and secure in-app payment processing.
highlights: Real-time GPS location tracking and maps integration
Direct in-app messaging between users and professionals
Rating and review system with photo verification
Secure payment gateway with multiple payment options
Service history and booking management system
challenge: Building a two-sided marketplace that required real-time updates, secure transactions, and reliable matching between users and service professionals across different regions.
solution: Implemented Firebase Realtime Database for instant messaging and status updates, Stripe for secure payments, Redux for state management, and Google Maps API for location-based matching. Added offline-first architecture for reliability.

title: Dotnet Core Mess Management
tagline: Complete hostel mess management and billing system
description: Built a comprehensive mess management system for college hostels using .NET Core and SQL Server. The system handles meal tracking, automatic billing, student management, complaint resolution, and financial reports with a clean admin dashboard.
highlights: Meal attendance tracking with QR code scanning
SMS and email notifications for bills
challenge: Creating a robust system that could handle hundreds of students, accurate billing calculations, and generate detailed financial reports while remaining easy to use for non-technical staff.
solution: Designed a clean relational database schema with proper normalization, implemented stored procedures for complex billing calculations, added comprehensive error handling, and built an intuitive admin interface with role-based access control.

title: E-Commerce Platform
tagline: Multi-vendor e-commerce marketplace with advanced features
description: Developed a scalable e-commerce platform supporting multiple vendors, with inventory management, order tracking, payment processing, and logistics integration. Features include seller dashboard, customer reviews, wishlist functionality, and admin analytics.
highlights: Advanced product search with AI recommendations
Real-time order tracking with delivery updates
challenge: Building a platform that could handle concurrent transactions, prevent inventory conflicts, and provide separate dashboards for vendors and admins with real-time synchronization.
solution: Implemented transaction handling with MongoDB sessions, used queue systems for order processing, created separate API routes for vendor and admin operations, and integrated real-time notifications for inventory updates.

title: Social Media Dashboard
tagline: Unified social media management and analytics platform
description: Created an all-in-one social media management tool that aggregates content from multiple platforms, schedules posts, tracks analytics, and provides engagement insights. Supports Twitter, Instagram, Facebook, and LinkedIn.
highlights: Unified notification center for all platforms
challenge: Integrating multiple social media APIs with different authentication methods and handling rate limits while providing real-time analytics across all platforms.
solution: Built an abstraction layer for API integrations, implemented caching strategies for analytics, used OAuth 2.0 for secure authentication, and created background jobs for scheduled post publishing.

title: Healthcare Portal
tagline: Patient management and telemedicine platform
description: Developed a comprehensive healthcare portal enabling patients to book appointments, consult doctors via video call, access medical records, and manage prescriptions. Includes a provider dashboard for appointment management.
highlights: Doctor appointment booking with real-time availability
challenge: Ensuring HIPAA compliance while providing seamless telemedicine experience with reliable video calling and secure patient data storage.
solution: Implemented end-to-end encryption for video calls using WebRTC, followed HIPAA guidelines for data handling, used AWS S3 with encryption for document storage, and added comprehensive audit logging.

title: Real Estate Listing Platform
tagline: Modern property listings with virtual tours and analytics
description: Built a real estate platform with advanced property listings, 3D virtual tours, interactive maps, mortgage calculator, saved listings, and agent management. Integrated with property databases for data enrichment.
highlights: Interactive property maps with neighborhood data
challenge: Integrating 3D virtual tours, handling large image galleries efficiently, and providing fast search across thousands of properties with complex filters.
solution: Used Three.js for 3D rendering with model optimization, implemented image lazy loading with WebP format, created indexed database queries for fast filtering, and added client-side caching for frequently searched areas.

title: Fitness Tracker App
tagline: Personal fitness tracking and workout management app
description: Designed and developed a fitness tracking app with workout logging, progress analytics, nutrition tracking, and social features. Integrates with popular fitness wearables and provides personalized workout recommendations.
highlights: Automatic workout tracking via wearable devices
Progress tracking with charts and analytics
Integration with Apple Health and Google Fit
challenge: Ensuring accurate health data tracking, providing real-time synchronization with wearables, and maintaining user privacy for sensitive health information.
solution: Integrated with HealthKit and Google Fit APIs for accurate wearable data, implemented end-to-end encryption for health data, used Firebase Cloud Messaging for real-time sync, and added comprehensive privacy controls.

title: Weather Dashboard
tagline: Beautiful weather app with detailed forecasts and alerts
description: Created a visually stunning weather application providing real-time weather, detailed forecasts, weather alerts, air quality information, and severe weather notifications. Features multiple locations and custom widgets.
highlights: Accurate real-time weather data from multiple sources
Air quality and UV index tracking
challenge: Combining data from multiple weather APIs, handling real-time updates efficiently, and creating a visually appealing interface that works across all devices.
solution: Built an API gateway to aggregate data from multiple sources, implemented caching strategies for reduced API calls, used Mapbox for location selection, and created responsive charts for forecast visualization.

title: Music Streaming Platform
tagline: High-fidelity music streaming with playlist management
description: Developed a music streaming platform with high-fidelity audio playback, playlist creation, artist discovery, and social sharing. Includes offline download capability, advanced search, and personalized recommendations based on listening history.
highlights: Social features with sharing and following
Advanced search with artist and album filters
challenge: Streaming high-quality audio efficiently, managing large media libraries, and handling concurrent connections for thousands of users.
solution: Implemented adaptive bitrate streaming, used Redis for caching frequently accessed tracks, optimized database queries with MongoDB indexing, and used WebAudio API for advanced audio controls.

title: Banking App
tagline: Secure mobile banking with advanced features
description: Built a secure banking application with account management, money transfers, bill payments, investment tracking, and financial planning tools. Implements military-grade encryption and multi-factor authentication.
highlights: Real-time account balance and transaction history
challenge: Building a highly secure banking application that meets regulatory compliance while providing seamless user experience with fast transactions.
solution: Implemented end-to-end encryption, JWT-based authentication, biometric support, rate limiting for security, and comprehensive audit logging for compliance. Added real-time fraud detection system.

title: Travel Booking Platform
tagline: One-stop travel booking for flights, hotels, and experiences
description: Created a comprehensive travel booking platform supporting flight searches, hotel reservations, experience bookings, travel insurance, and itinerary management. Includes real-time availability and price comparison.
highlights: Flight search with multiple airlines and filters
Hotel booking with reviews and ratings
Itinerary builder and trip planning tools
challenge: Integrating multiple travel APIs with different data formats and handling complex search and booking workflows with high transaction volume.
solution: Built an abstraction layer for API integrations, implemented robust error handling and fallback strategies, cached search results for performance, and created a transaction queue for reliable booking processing.

title: Project Management Tool
tagline: Collaborative project management with agile workflows
description: Developed a project management platform with Kanban boards, Gantt charts, team collaboration, time tracking, and reporting. Supports multiple project methodologies including Scrum and Kanban with real-time collaboration.
highlights: Team communication with comments and mentions
challenge: Handling real-time collaborative editing, ensuring data consistency across multiple clients, and providing different views for complex project structures.
solution: Implemented WebSocket-based real-time synchronization with operational transformation for conflict resolution, used PostgreSQL for strong consistency, and added comprehensive permissions system.

title: Customer Support System
tagline: Omnichannel customer support with AI assistance
description: Built an integrated customer support platform supporting email, chat, phone, and social media. Features include ticket management, knowledge base, AI-powered chatbot, and performanceanalytics for support teams.
highlights: Live chat with agent assignment and routing
challenge: Managing high-volume support tickets, implementing intelligent routing, and integrating AI chatbot while maintaining fast response times.
solution: Built intelligent ticket routing based on skill sets and load, implemented AI chatbot with escalation to human agents, used MongoDB aggregation for analytics, and optimized database queries.

title: Analytics Platform
tagline: Business intelligence and data visualization platform
description: Created a comprehensive analytics platform with real-time dashboards, custom reports, data warehousing, and predictive analytics. Connects to multiple data sources and provides interactive visualizations.
highlights: Advanced data visualization with 20+ chart types
Data source integration and ETL capabilities
challenge: Processing and visualizing large datasets efficiently, handling complex aggregations, and providing real-time dashboards without performance degradation.
solution: Implemented data warehousing with PostgreSQL, used D3.js for advanced visualizations, created materialized views for fast aggregations, and built Python microservices for ML predictions.
